debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn : n > 0
⊢ deriv riemannZeta (-2 * ↑n) ≠ 0

failed_attempts:
by
  have := riemannZeta_simple_trivial_zero hn
  exact this

by
  have := riemannZeta_trivial_zero_simple hn

by
  have h := zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple (-2 * ↑n)
  simp [CriticalStrip, hn] at h
  exact h (by simp [riemannZeta_neg_even_eq_zero])

by
  have h1 : riemannZeta (-2 * ↑n) = 0 := by
    apply Mathlib.NumberTheory.LSeries.RiemannZeta.riemannZeta_neg_even_eq_zero
    exact hn
  have h2 : ¬IsNontrivialZero (-2 * ↑n) := by
    intro h
    cases' h with hz hnz
    apply hnz
    use n - 1
    simp [hn]
  -- Use known fact that trivial zeros are simple
  apply Mathlib.NumberTheory.LSeries.RiemannZeta.riemannZeta_deriv_neg_even_ne_zero
  exact hn

  exact h3
